brief: Wildfires in Spain and a massive typhoon threaten East Asia, while EU regulators accuse Meta of addictive design and UK shops deploy facial recognition. Research highlights include a dashboard for missing data, AI in crime linkage, and visual analysis of traditional Chinese paintings.
news_summary: At least 11 die in southern Spain wildfires; Typhoon Bavi threatens Taiwan and China. EU accuses Meta of addictive design; UK shops launch facial recognition alerting police. UK politics sees Farage and Reform viewed as sleazy.
papers_summary: Papers explore tools for missing data (ImputeViz), AI-assisted crime linkage, and a composition-graph system for traditional Chinese paintings. Other works cover brain-computer interface trials in China and sign language recognition gloves.

en.brief: Wildfires in Spain and a massive typhoon threaten East Asia, while EU regulators accuse Meta of addictive design and UK shops deploy facial recognition. Research highlights include a dashboard for missing data, AI in crime linkage, and visual analysis of traditional Chinese paintings.
en.news_summary: At least 11 die in southern Spain wildfires; Typhoon Bavi threatens Taiwan and China. EU accuses Meta of addictive design; UK shops launch facial recognition alerting police. UK politics sees Farage and Reform viewed as sleazy.
en.papers_summary: Papers explore tools for missing data (ImputeViz), AI-assisted crime linkage, and a composition-graph system for traditional Chinese paintings. Other works cover brain-computer interface trials in China and sign language recognition gloves.

zh.brief: 今日焦点包括福建鞋厂火灾致28人死亡、超强台风巴威逼近台湾和福建、以及新加坡夫妇收养印尼男婴疑涉人口贩运案件。论文方面关注AI在犯罪关联分析和缺失数据可视化中的应用。
zh.news_summary: 福建泉州晋江鞋厂大火造成28人遇难，习近平指示严肃追责；超强台风巴威逼近台湾，12县市停班停课；新加坡夫妇收养印尼男婴案揭露儿童贩运问题。
zh.papers_summary: arXiv论文展示AI辅助犯罪关联分析系统的工业研究，以及用于诊断缺失数据和比较插补方法的可视化仪表板ImputeViz。

todays_image.caption: Like the woven inscriptions of authority on a Tiraz tapestry, Pauline Hanson's pseudo-events fabricate a global brand of far-right appeal.
todays_image.title: Tiraz tapestry
